s2.ptxt: Remove the speedometer drive gear from the front differential case assembly.
Put matchmarks on the front differential ring gear and the front differential case.
Using a plastic hammer, remove the front differential case.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DIFFERENTIAL PINION SHAFT STRAIGHT PIN

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, unstake the staked part of the front differential case.
Using a pin punch and a hammer, remove the front differential pinion shaft straight pin from the front differential case.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 FRONT DIFFERENTIAL PINION SHAFT

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 1 front differential pinion shaft from the front differential case.

Remove the 2 front differential pinions, 2 front differential pinion thrust washers, 2 front differential side gears, and 2 front differential side gear thrust washers from the front differential case.

atten4.ptxt: Remove the 2 pinion thrust washers and side gear thrust washers while turning the front differential pinion.
